title: For educational use only
message: This demo provides general health education and symptom explanation only. It is not a substitute for professional medical care.

title: Not a diagnosis tool
message: This system does not provide formal diagnosis, personalized treatment plans, or prescriptions. Always consult a qualified clinician for decisions about your care.

title: Emergency symptoms need urgent care
message: If you have emergency warning signs such as trouble breathing, persistent chest pain or pressure, confusion, severe allergic reaction, or severe dehydration, seek emergency medical care immediately.

title: Do not self-diagnose from web content
message: Health information on the internet should not replace professional medical help. Use this demo to support questions and discussion with a healthcare provider, not for self-diagnosis or self-treatment in serious illness.

source.name: NIH FAQ - Health information on the Internet

title: Drug information is simplified
message: Medication information in this demo is simplified from public drug-label sources for classroom demonstration. Real prescribing, dosing, warnings, and contraindications must be confirmed from a clinician or official label.
